title: oncidium × limbatum
intro: Oncidium × limbatum, also known as the oncidium orchid, is a hybrid species of orchid that is native to Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Oncidium × limbatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
